s2.missingWorkload: If rpe or duration missing → workload = 0
s2.exampleWorkload: Example: 1h30 (90 min) session with RPE 6 → Workload = 90 * 6 = 540

s7.statusReturned: If status == Returned or null → penalty = 0

s8.title: 8) Building AthleteStateDto (pipeline)
s8.step1: Normalize referenceDate, fetch RPE sessions in the window, build recentLoads, fetch sleep logs, compute injuryPenalty and call BuildStateFromAggregates.
s8.step2: Compute acute/chronic, select sleepForDate (fallback to last available), then call BuildState.
s8.step3: Compute ACWR, SF, RecoveryScore, Fatigue, FitnessTerm, Readiness and construct the AthleteStateDto.

dataPolicy.title: Athlete Hub - Data Privacy Policy
dataPolicy.introduction: This policy explains how Athlete Hub collects, uses, and protects your personal and sensitive data. We are transparent about every aspect of data processing, including the use of JWT technology for secure authentication.
dataPolicy.encryptionDesc: All data is encrypted in transit and at rest
dataPolicy.jwtSecureDesc: Signed tokens with short expiration times
dataPolicy.gdprComplianceDesc: We respect GDPR and privacy laws
dataPolicy.contactDpo: You can contact us for any questions about privacy or to exercise your rights.
dataPolicy.authDesc: Used to verify your identity and allow secure access to the platform
dataPolicy.passwordDesc: Hashed with Argon2 (never in plain text)
dataPolicy.personalDataDesc: To personalize your experience and show you relevant data for your sport
dataPolicy.healthDataDesc: These are sensitive data protected by special regulations
dataPolicy.athleticTestsDesc: Results of performance tests (jumps, speed, etc.)
dataPolicy.injuryDataDesc: Type, severity, date and duration of injuries
dataPolicy.specialConsentDesc: You gave your explicit consent to process this sensitive data during registration
dataPolicy.usageDataDesc: To improve security, debug problems and understand how you use the platform
dataPolicy.timestampDesc: Date and time of your accesses and actions
dataPolicy.pagesVisitedDesc: Which sections of the app you use
dataPolicy.jwtExplanation: JWT (JSON Web Token) is an international security standard we use to verify your identity without storing the password in the session.
dataPolicy.step1Desc: The browser sends credentials to the server in encrypted form (HTTPS)
dataPolicy.step2Desc: The server checks if the password matches the stored hash (never sees the password)
dataPolicy.step3Desc: If correct, the server creates a digitally signed JWT with expiration (15 minutes)
dataPolicy.step4Desc: The JWT is sent to the browser and stored in localStorage
dataPolicy.step5Desc: Each request includes the JWT in the Authorization header
dataPolicy.jwtBenefitsDesc: Stateless (server doesn't store sessions), secure (digitally signed), scalable (works well in distributed environments) and standard for modern web applications
dataPolicy.serviceDeliveryDesc: We store and organize your training, performance and health data to let you track your progress over time.
dataPolicy.analyticsDesc: We use aggregated and anonymized data to identify trends, improve features and create better training plans.
dataPolicy.securityDesc: We monitor access logs to detect suspicious activity, hacking and unauthorized use of your account.
dataPolicy.communicationsDesc: If you opted to receive newsletters or notifications, we use your data to send you relevant updates and personalized advice.
dataPolicy.legalDesc: If required by law, we may disclose your data to competent authorities (e.g. police requests).
dataPolicy.httpsDesc: All data in transit is encrypted end-to-end
dataPolicy.encryptionAtRestDesc: Sensitive data in the database is encrypted
dataPolicy.passwordHashingDesc: We use Argon2 (algorithm resistant to brute force)
dataPolicy.jwtSignedDesc: JWTs are digitally signed and cannot be altered
dataPolicy.httpOnlyCookiesDesc: Refresh Token is stored in HttpOnly cookie (inaccessible from JavaScript)
dataPolicy.corsConfiguredDesc: Only authorized domains can access the APIs
dataPolicy.rateLimitingDesc: Protection against brute force and DoS attacks
dataPolicy.auditLoggingDesc: All important accesses are logged for security checks
dataPolicy.monitoringDesc: Automatic systems monitor suspicious activity in real-time
dataPolicy.responsibilityDesc: Don't share your password with anyone. If you suspect unauthorized access, immediately change your password or contact us.
dataPolicy.gdprArticle6a: 6(1)(a): Explicit consent of the data subject
dataPolicy.gdprArticle9a: 9(2)(a): Explicit consent of the data subject (you consented during registration)
dataPolicy.dataRetention: How Long We Keep Your Data
dataPolicy.retentionNote: When you delete your account, your personal data is deleted immediately, but backups may temporarily retain encrypted data for security reasons.
dataPolicy.userRightsIntro: Based on European GDPR and privacy laws, you have the following rights
dataPolicy.rightOfAccessDesc: You can request a copy of all our data about you. We'll send you a CSV file with all your information within 30 days.
dataPolicy.rightOfRectificationDesc: If your data is inaccurate or incomplete, you can request correction. You can also correct many data directly in your profile.
dataPolicy.rightToBeForget: Right to Erasure / Right to be Forgotten (Art. 17 GDPR)
dataPolicy.rightToBeForgetDesc: You can request complete deletion of your account and all personal data. This will happen within 30 days, unless there are legal retention obligations.
dataPolicy.rightToPortabilityDesc: You can request your data in a standard format (e.g. JSON or CSV) to transfer to another platform.
dataPolicy.rightToRestriction: Right to Restriction of Processing (Art. 18 GDPR)
dataPolicy.rightToRestrictionDesc: You can request that we limit the processing of your data while we verify a dispute or complaint.
dataPolicy.rightToObjectDesc: You can object to the processing of your data, especially for marketing and communications. You can manage preferences in your profile.
dataPolicy.rightToAutomatedDecisionsDesc: We do not use machine learning algorithms to make significant decisions about you. Any analysis is informative, not binding.
dataPolicy.exerciseRightsDesc: Send a written request to our DPO (Data Protection Officer) at the email address
dataPolicy.exerciseRightsNote: Specify clearly which right you want to exercise (access, rectification, deletion, etc.) and provide identifiers to verify your identity.
dataPolicy.dataSharingIntro: Your data is NOT sold to third parties. We share it only when strictly necessary
dataPolicy.emailDesc: Resend, SendGrid (to send you notifications and password reset)
dataPolicy.dpaNoteDesc: We have Data Processing Agreements (DPA) with all providers to ensure they don't use your data for their own purposes.
dataPolicy.protectRights: To protect rights, privacy and security of people and resources
dataPolicy.acquisition: In case of business acquisition (data transfer to new owner)
dataPolicy.authTokenCookieDesc: HttpOnly, Secure, SameSite=Strict - Necessary to keep you logged in
dataPolicy.themeCookieDesc: localStorage - Remembers if you prefer dark or light theme
dataPolicy.noTrackingDesc: Tracking pixels, Google Analytics, or retargeting systems. We believe in the privacy of our users.
dataPolicy.contactPrivacyDesc: If you have questions about this policy or privacy
dataPolicy.responseTime: We will respond within 5 business days.
dataPolicy.complaintToAuthorityDesc: If you believe your privacy is not being respected, you have the right to file a complaint with the competent authority (Data Protection Authority)
dataPolicy.footer: This policy is legally binding. If you do not accept these terms, you cannot use Athlete Hub.

hero.subtitle: Open Beta · Free for founding coaches
hero.description: Athlete Hub centralizes all your athletes in one dashboard. Monitor workloads, performance and recovery — in real time, without spreadsheets, without losing hours every week.
hero.ctaStart: I want to test it for free

pain.title: Do you recognize yourself in at least one of these?
pain.item1Title: You have 4 Excel files open at the same time
pain.item1Desc: One file for workloads, one for measurements, one for injuries, one for sessions. And every week you spend hours cross-referencing data.
pain.item2Title: You don't know in real time who is at risk
pain.item2Desc: An athlete exceeds the ACWR threshold, but you only find out when they get injured. All it would have taken was one automatic alert.
pain.item3Title: Athletes don't fill in their feedback
pain.item3Desc: You ask for RPE via chat, message, verbally. Some respond. Most don't. The data is always incomplete.
pain.item4Title: Every piece of data is scattered across different places
pain.item4Desc: WhatsApp, email, paper, various apps. No single place. No overview. Every decision is partial.
pain.outro: If you recognize yourself in at least one of these, Athlete Hub was built exactly for you.

benefits.title: Less chaos.
benefits.subtitle: This isn't another piece of software to learn. It's the system you've been missing to do your job properly.
benefits.b1Desc: RPE collection is automatic. Athletes receive a link after each session and fill it in within 10 seconds. Zero chasing, zero messages.
benefits.b2Title: See who's at risk before they get hurt
benefits.b2Desc: ACWR is calculated automatically for every athlete. When the ratio exceeds the threshold, you get an alert — not after the injury.
benefits.b3Desc: Workloads, performance, sleep, injuries, session agenda. One dashboard instead of 5 different tools.
benefits.b4Desc: With data updated in real time, you no longer have to wait until Monday to understand how your athletes are doing. You make decisions with data, not instinct.

howItWorks.title: Three steps.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Add your athletes, upload basic data and configure monitoring parameters. It takes less than 5 minutes.
howItWorks.step2Desc: After each session they automatically receive a link by email. One click and they submit RPE and how they're feeling. Zero friction.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Dashboard updated in real time. Automatic alerts for overload and injury risk. All the information where and when you need it.

features.title: Stop managing data.
features.subtitle: Everything a performance coach needs in one place — automated, always up to date.
features.descPrecisioneACWR: ACWR calculated automatically for every athlete. Immediate alert when the ratio becomes dangerous — before the damage is done.
features.descFeedbackLoop: Automatic email link after every session. Athletes submit RPE in 10 seconds from their phone. The data reaches you without having to chase anyone.
features.descPianificazione: Create multi-athlete sessions with intensity targets. See at a glance who hit their load targets and who didn't.
features.descClinicalData: Log every injury, track recovery stages and get automatic alerts for return to play. Nothing gets forgotten.
features.sleepDesc: Track sleep hours and recovery quality. Know every day whether an athlete is truly ready to train — or whether you're taking a risk.
features.aiDesc: Ask in plain language: 'Who's overloaded this week?' Get the answer in a second, without searching through spreadsheets.
features.injuryDesc: Automatic alerts when risk factors align. Full history of every injury and a structured Return To Play protocol.

comparison.row8: AI assistant with natural language queries

showcase.title: See the platform.
showcase.titleSub: Everything you need, on one screen.
showcase.tab0Desc: Real-time team overview: ACWR status for every athlete, average readiness, weekly load trend, and risk flags — all visible at a glance.
showcase.tab1Desc: Plan sessions, manage events and automatically send RPE links to athletes. The calendar does the work for you.
showcase.tab2Desc: Individual analysis: ACWR trend, readiness score, acute vs chronic load history. Everything you need to decide how to train that athlete today.
showcase.tab3Desc: Sleep hours, REM phases, deep sleep and recovery quality over time. Knowing whether an athlete slept poorly completely changes how you train them.
showcase.tab4Desc: Ask anything in natural language. Manage events, check statistics, get load recommendations. The AI responds in a second.

scalability.title: YOUR ATHLETES' DATA IS SAFE.
scalability.description: Athlete Hub is built on end-to-end encrypted infrastructure. Your athletes' health and performance data is never shared, sold or passed on to third parties.
scalability.dataIntegrityDesc: Hourly backups and real-time cloud sync.
scalability.securityDesc: 256-bit encryption. Your data never leaves your control.

pricing.title: Right now it's free.
pricing.titleSub: Forever for those who join now.
pricing.subtitle: We're in beta. All access is completely free. Coaches who join now lock in today's price forever — even when paid plans are introduced.
pricing.betaDesc: Full access to every feature. Reserved for coaches who join during the beta.
pricing.starterDesc: For individual coaches managing a small team.
pricing.proDesc: For clubs and sport science staff with multi-team needs.
pricing.earlyAdopterNote: The first 100 coaches lock in Beta pricing forever — even after paid plans launch.

roadmap.title: What's coming next
roadmap.subtitle: We're building the software together with the coaches who use it every day.

waitlist.title: Join the beta. Free.
waitlist.subtitle: Still using Excel? You're 2 minutes away from changing everything. The first coaches to join get lifetime free access — and the right to shape future features.
waitlist.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
waitlist.successMessage: We'll reach out within 24 hours to activate your account. Thank you for choosing to test Athlete Hub.
waitlist.noSpam: No spam. Unsubscribe at any time. Data protected.

monitoringDoc.title: How Athlete Monitoring Works
monitoringDoc.subtitle: Explanation of scores, formulas, and calculation rules
monitoringDoc.summary: This page explains how the platform calculates every score and index shown in the athlete monitoring dashboard. No technical background required  each section describes the logic in plain language.

s8.title: How the overall state is assembled

s1.referenceDate: All calculations are anchored to the selected reference date (today by default). Data from future dates is always excluded.
s1.rpeWindow: The platform looks back 28 days to collect RPE training sessions.
s1.acute: Acute load: sum of all daily training loads in the last 7 days.
s1.chronic: Chronic load: sum of all daily training loads in the last 28 days.
s1.sleepWindow: Sleep data: the 7 days leading up to and including the reference date.

s2.intro: Each training session produces a load value that combines duration and perceived effort.
s2.missingWorkload: If either duration or RPE is missing, that session contributes 0 to the load.
s2.exampleWorkload: Example: a 90-minute session rated RPE 6  Load = 90  6 = 540

s3.intro: The ACWR compares the recent training load (last 7 days) against the average weekly load of the past month. It indicates whether the athlete is doing significantly more or less than usual.
s3.acwrFallback: If no chronic load data is available, ACWR defaults to 1.0 (neutral  no risk signal).
s3.interpretation: Safe zone: 0.8  1.3. Moderate risk: above 1.3. High risk: above 1.5.

s4.intro: Monotony measures how varied the training load is day by day. High monotony means the athlete is doing roughly the same load every day without variation.
s4.formula: Monotony = Average daily load  Standard deviation of daily loads
s4.note: A value of 0 means standard deviation is zero (all days identical). Higher values signal lack of variety.

s5.intro: The Sleep Factor summarises sleep quality into a single value between 0 and 1. It is used to compute recovery and readiness.
s5.components: Hours slept, subjective quality (15 scale), sleep efficiency (%), and optional wearable score (0100).
s5.calculation: Only components with available data are used. Their weighted contributions are summed and normalised to the [0, 1] range.

s6.intro: Readiness summarises how ready the athlete is to train today. It combines recovery, fatigue, and accumulated fitness.
s6.fatigue: Fatigue Score = driven by ACWR excess above 1.0 and poor sleep (capped at 100)
s6.fitness: Fitness Term = long-term fitness bonus based on chronic load accumulation (020 points)
s6.formula: Readiness = Recovery  0.6  Fatigue + Fitness Term, then reduced by any Injury Penalty. Final value capped between 0 and 100.

s7.intro: Active injuries reduce the athlete's readiness score. The penalty depends on the injury status and severity.
s7.statusReturned: Athletes marked as Returned (fully recovered) receive no penalty.
s7.basePenalty: Base penalty by status: Active injury = 70 pts, In rehabilitation = 35 pts.
s7.severityMultiplier: Severity multiplier: Career-ending = 1.5, Severe = 1.3, Moderate = 1.1, Minor = 0.8.
s7.recoveryDecay: The penalty decreases linearly as recovery time progresses relative to the expected recovery duration.
s7.penaltyFormula: Final Penalty = Base  Severity Multiplier  Recovery Factor (capped at 100)

s8.intro: When you request an athlete's state, the platform executes the following steps automatically:
s8.step1: Collect all relevant data: RPE sessions, sleep logs, and active injuries for the reference date window.
s8.step2: Compute acute and chronic loads, select the most recent sleep record if today's is missing, and evaluate injury penalties.
s8.step3: Run all formulas (ACWR, Sleep Factor, Recovery, Fatigue, Fitness, Readiness) and produce the final monitoring scores.

s9.description: Future-day predictions use the average load of the last 7 days as the expected daily load, and the average Sleep Factor as the expected sleep quality (defaulting to 0.75 if no recent data). Acute and chronic loads are then recalculated for each predicted day.

s10.description: Performance tests (speed, strength, endurance, etc.) are compared to reference standards. Each metric is labelled as Above Standard, Within Range, or Below Standard based on the target value and whether a higher or lower result is better for that test.

s11.title: Data availability & fallbacks
s11.missingData: When data is partially missing, the platform applies safe defaults rather than blocking the calculation:
s11.fallback1: Missing RPE or session duration  that session contributes 0 to the load.
s11.fallback3: No sleep record for today  the most recent available record is used.
s11.fallback4: No sleep data at all  Sleep Factor defaults to 0.75.

s12.summary: In short: dates are always normalised to UTC. ACWR divides chronic load by 4 to get a weekly average. Readiness combines sleep, fatigue, and fitness. Missing data is handled with safe fallbacks rather than errors.

s2.missingWorkload: If rpe or duration are missing → workload = 0
s2.exampleWorkload: Example: 1h30 session (90 min) with RPE 6 → Workload = 90 * 6 = 540

s7.statusReturned: If status == Returned or null → penalty = 0
